changedFiles.reason: Define the immutable public-install process correction and release recovery boundary.
Record root cause, TDD, generated evidence, verification, and remaining hosted-release work.
Record the exact base and dedicated branch.
Generate governed lifecycle status.
Run the exact tagged Quick Install verifier after Draft asset checks and before publication.
Promote archive verification to immutable verified state while binding canonical archive and installer evidence.
Repair the local verified-capability fixture so it includes the installer file consumed by the verifier.
Cover finalizer capability promotion and retain in-process canonical archive coverage within the existing budget.
Enforce tagged Quick Install ordering between Draft validation and draft=false.
Advance the fixed Quick Install default to corrective release v0.5.41.
Project the finalized v0.5.41 installer, archive, and verified capability contract.
Keep v0.5.42 as the distinct unpublished candidate.
Record canonical v0.5.41/v0.5.42 lineage and projection digests.
Generate candidate source-tree and canonical archive evidence.
Generate the release artifact identity tuple and digest bindings.
Regenerate the v0.5.41 candidate SBOM baseline.
Regenerate v0.5.41 candidate provenance.
Document the corrective release and immutable quarantines.
Document verified finalization and the tagged Draft prepublication gate.
Document the same release process in Japanese.
Advance the documented installer ref to v0.5.41.
Advance the Japanese installer ref to v0.5.41.
Generated archive discovery index.
Immutable archive evidence root.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Fix the immutable contract generator and add an executable prepublish gate rather than hand-editing release.json.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: The finalizer now owns verified capability generation and the release workflow owns the tagged Draft gate.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Use the same Quick Install verifier for prepublish and independent public verification.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: release.yml invokes scripts/verify_quick_install_release.py, the same verifier used by install.sh and the public audit.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not rewrite or republish failed immutable tags; supersede them with the next patch release.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: v0.5.39 and v0.5.40 remain unchanged Draft quarantines; metadata prepares v0.5.41.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep archiveGrowth warning-only and do not relax any existing release check.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Complexity passes with archiveGrowth=543 as warning; no release or coverage threshold was raised.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Use test-driven development and preserve exact-source workflow ordering.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Both missing behaviors failed first, passed after implementation, and full quality passed with 937 tests and 85.04% coverage.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: An immutable release tag contains a bound archive digest but sha256ArchiveVerification remains verified false.
Strict smoke passes before the immutable tag exists and cannot exercise the final tagged Quick Install contract.
The exact Draft tag and uploaded canonical Release asset pass Quick Install verification before draft=false.
evidence: authenticated v0.5.40 Draft asset download SHA abfd98edf1ac6963de53e659708db1d6bab868e0052438c2e1cb9a8b5d26543a
final independent review approved HEAD b34d83e2

scenarioCoverage.scenario: v0.5.39 and v0.5.40 remain unchanged Draft quarantines while v0.5.41 is prepared without publication.

risk.detail: Hosted PR, merged-main CI, Draft tagged verification, publication, and independent public audit remain mandatory before release completion.

observedIssues: v0.5.40 passed the release workflow and strict smoke but its immutable release.json retained sha256ArchiveVerification.verified=false.
The release workflow did not execute the real tagged Quick Install contract before draft=false.
Full quality exposed an obsolete local distribution fixture that omitted source/install.sh once verified capability became true.
Removing redundant detached tests reduced measured in-process coverage because subprocess execution is not attributed; compact canonical archive coverage restored the threshold without raising it.
Python and Markdown complexity initially exceeded their existing limits; duplicate tests and redundant prose were consolidated without weakening behavior.
Independent review caught both the missing canonical Draft asset binding and the production URL mismatch before any v0.5.41 tag existed; both paths were corrected and re-reviewed.

residualRisks.detail: PR Actions, merge, lifecycle closure, exact-main Actions/preflight, v0.5.41 Draft gate, publication, and independent public distribution must still pass.

reviewReadiness.reason: All required verification passed; residual risk remains documented.
expectedReviewFocus: Finalizer promotes verified capability only with canonical archive and installer bindings.
Draft tag and assets are validated before the tagged Quick Install verifier and draft=false.
Local fixture repair does not weaken digest rejection.
v0.5.41/v0.5.42 projections and generated evidence remain consistent.

boundaryChecks.runtimeEntrypoints: verified: install.sh defaults to v0.5.41 and release.yml invokes the exact tagged verifier before publication
boundaryChecks.userVisibleOutput: verified: release verification fails closed before draft=false
boundaryChecks.persistence: verified: finalizer writes release.json, release-state, freeze, and digest bindings atomically in one generation stage
boundaryChecks.localization: verified: English and Japanese distribution/install documentation changed together
boundaryChecks.generatedArtifacts: verified: SBOM, provenance, release digests, freeze, state, and release projection were generated by repository commands
boundaryChecks.makeEntrypoints: verified: candidate finalizer and make quality passed

userCorrectionsCaptured: Repair release workflow or obsolete-code blockers before attempting publication.
Do not use temporary workarounds for release-process defects.
Monitor GitHub Actions after CI starts.
userCorrectionSolidification: Verified archive capability is now generated before publication instead of assumed to change after publication.
The exact tagged Quick Install is a mandatory Draft-to-public transition gate.
Obsolete fixture behavior and complexity/coverage blockers were corrected without weakening thresholds.
knownGaps: PR Actions, merge, ai-close-work-item, exact-main Actions/preflight, v0.5.41 publication, and independent public audit remain pending.
overclaimPrevention: Do not claim v0.5.41 is released until the immutable tag, public Release assets, and independent distribution audit all pass.
